scripts.migrate: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const fs=require('fs'); const pool=require('./src/config/db'); pool.query(fs.readFileSync('./src/db/schema.sql','utf8')).then(()=>{console.log('Migrazione completata'); return pool.end();}).catch(e=>{console.error(e); process.exit(1);})"
scripts.setup: npm run migrate && npm run db:reset && npm run seed:dirigente
